What People Say

Words from People I Have Worked With

From CEOs to founders, here is what my collaborators have to say.

"

Aleena led our entire marketing function and delivered results that genuinely moved the business forward. She scaled our newsletter from 1,500 to 31,000+ subscribers, grew our LinkedIn by 200%, and built the webinar engine that consistently pulled 500+ registrations per session. She also handled deliverables for Fortune 500 clients including NASA, Aramco, and Netflix, and the response was outstanding. From thought leadership to executive comms for Davos 2025, she owned the full A-to-Z with a level of precision and drive that is rare to find.

Dino Gane-Palmer
CEO, PreScouter
"

Aleena is the definition of a self-starter. She came in, understood the product, and started shipping work from day one without needing to be told what to do. Her creativity in content and demand generation is matched by a real strategic instinct. She is proactive, ambitious, and brings fresh ideas to the table constantly. If you are looking for someone who takes ownership and runs with it, she is the person.

Mariam Jomha
Marketing Director, Auxee AI
"

Working with Aleena was a breath of fresh air. She handled our entire marketing presence with full autonomy, from brand voice and website copy to social media strategy and community campaigns. She understood the sensitivity our community needed and delivered creative work that resonated deeply. Her ability to operate independently while still being deeply collaborative made her invaluable to SEMA.

Sofia Akbar
CEO & Founder, SEMA
"

Aleena joined us as a junior member and within months she had absorbed everything, delivering at a level well beyond her experience. She learned fast, executed faster, and climbed the ladder quicker than anyone we have seen. She became such an integral part of our team that we offered her a senior partner role. A true dream team member who raises the bar for everyone around her.

Saad Ahmed
CEO, Esirius
"

Aleena combines creativity with sharp strategic thinking in a way that consistently delivers. She does not just make things look good, she makes them work. Her insights on positioning, content direction, and campaign structure were always on point. Highly motivated, deeply professional, and someone who genuinely understands how to translate a brief into results.

Faizan Khalid
CEO, Infyntrix Solutions
"

One of the best storytellers I have worked with. Aleena has a natural gift for writing that makes complex topics feel approachable and engaging. She adapted to our editorial style instantly, picked up new formats with ease, and consistently delivered content that performed. Fast learner, incredibly adaptable, and someone who brings genuine enthusiasm to every project she touches.

Zoona
Founder, Outfit Trends
"

Aleena does not just deliver strategies, she delivers on promises. Her creative eye for social media is unlike anything I have seen. She understood our brand voice immediately and turned it into content that connected with our audience at scale. Her communication is clear, her execution is fast, and her storytelling ability brings a brand to life in a way that feels authentic and memorable. Truly one of a kind.

Rumsha
Founder, Rayseen
"

Aleena brought energy and professionalism to every campaign she touched. She managed influencer relationships end to end with a level of care and attention that kept both creators and clients happy. Her organisational skills and ability to juggle multiple projects at once made her a standout team member. Reliable, sharp, and always a pleasure to work with.

Safaa Rauf
CEO, Mad Media
